case_title: 655 POWELL I5, LLC VS. MIREYA GARTLAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 655 POWELL I5, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARTLAND, MIREYA AN INDIVIDUAL SHAHEEN, JUMANAH AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 655 POWELL STREET #306, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CA 94108, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF 655 POWELL I5, LLC SERVED OCT-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-31-2016 AS TO DEFENDANT GARTLAND, MIREYA AN INDIVIDUAL
